Video.summary: PFL in 60 - 2025 World Tournament 5
Video.title: PFL in 60 - 2025 World Tournament 5

Video.summary: In the peoples main event, undefeated contedner and fan favorite Justin Gaethje (12-0) takes on Melvin Guillard (32-13-2) in a catchweight bout at WSOF 15, 2014. The hostility between the two fighters during fight week made this the most anticipated bout of the weekend.
Video.title: Full Fight: Gaethje v. Guillard

Video.summary: In a back and forth 3 round bout, undefeated lightweight prospect Justin Gaethje (8-0) takes on MMA veteran Brian Cobb (20-7) at WSOF 3, 2013.
Video.title: Full Fight: Gaethje v. Cobb

Video.summary: In a rematch of one of the best fights in WSOF history, undefeated lightweight champ Justin Gaethje (14-0) attempts to defend his belt against Luis Palomino (23-10) for the second time. Gaethje vs Palomino 2 in the main event of WSOF 23, 2015.
Video.title: Full Fight: Gaethje v. Palomino 2

Video.summary: PFL in 60 - 2025 World Tournament 2
Video.title: PFL in 60 - 2025 World Tournament 2

Video.summary: In the lightweight championship main event, undefeated champ Justin Gaethje (15-0) attempts to defend his throne against Brian Foster (26-8) at WSOF 29, 2016.
Video.title: Full Fight: Gaethje v. Foster

Video.summary: Full Fight: Gaethje v. Cobb
Video.title: Full Fight: Gaethje v. Cobb

Video.summary: The PFL Playoff events always bring the drama! With so many eyes wathching to see who will fight in the PFL Championship, Amanda Leve, Brandon Jenkins, and Antonio Carlos Jr. deliver spectacular performances
Video.title: New Bloods
